title: Soul Mage Origin
description: An origins addon that adds a new origin the Soul Mage!
body:
# Abilities
**Soul Mage**

You were once a villager, but unlike all the others you decide to use the souls of others to do things for you!

[+] When killing mobs you collect their soul!

[+] (Primary) Using the souls you have collected you are able to levitate and stop yourself from taking fall damage! (Consumes 1 soul every second)

[+] By sneak + right clicking an entity with an empty hand curse them at the cost of 5 souls!

[+] (Load Toolbar Activator) Create and shoot a beam made of 10 souls that you have collected!

[+] When at max soul count you are able to revive yourself after death!

[+] (Secondary) By continuously consuming souls you become stronger but you become very tired after!

[-] Collecting and holding souls in your body has taken a toll on you, causing you to deal 25% less damage and have 2 less heaerts than a normal human!

[-] Villagers and wandering traders fear you so they deny to trade with you!
